task_prompt: Run all R files in the code folder
tasks: Based on replication results, how many non-attrited users are in the main analysis sample? Only report the number.
What is the effect size of empathy-based counterspeech on the volume of xenophobic tweets? Only report the number in SD units rounded to two decimal places.
What is the p-value for the effect of empathy-based counterspeech on the propensity to delete the original xenophobic tweet? Only report the number rounded to three decimal places.
